description: Create ai_core/persistent_memory.cpp - Session-persistent memory using flat file storage
steps: Implement user interaction storage with timestamps
Implement load on boot and save on shutdown
Implement configurable memory limits with pruning
acceptance_criteria: File compiles without errors as part of make all
Has configurable max entries with oldest-first pruning
verification: Run make all and confirm zero compile errors
findings: Created ai_core/persistent_memory.cpp with flat-file based session persistence. Supports timestamped interactions, preference tracking with confidence, Q&A history recall, configurable memory limits with oldest-first pruning. Compiles cleanly.
